description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with 'PropertyReport.docx', a real estate listing description. Insert three images from 'Documents\PropertyPhotos' into the document with specific formatting. Place 'exterior.jpg' after the 1st paragraph (Property Overview) with 'Square' text wrapping, 3-inch width, and Alt Text 'Front exterior view of 742 Evergreen Terrace'. Place 'interior.jpg' after the 3rd paragraph (Interior Features) with 'Tight' text wrapping, 2.5-inch width, and Alt Text 'Living room interior with natural lighting'. Place 'floorplan.jpg' after the 5th paragraph (Floor Plan) with 'Top and Bottom' text wrapping, 5-inch width, horizontal centering, and Alt Text 'Floor plan layout showing room dimensions'. Save the document.
